mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WFG_PORTMIS_TEST.RE_CARGO_NAME (ID, OLD_CARGO_NAME, NEW_CARGO_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CODE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id}, #{oldCargoName}, #{newCargoName}, #{cargoCategoryCode}, #{cargoCode}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createByName}, #{createTime})
